name: forgeax-studio
description: ForgeaX Studio — AI-native game development environment
comment_dependencies: react-dom 19 declares scheduler as a peer dep, but bun (≥1.3) does not auto-install peer deps the way npm/pnpm do. Without an explicit dependency here, esbuild fails resolving 'scheduler' from inside react-dom-client.development.js on Windows + bun (Windows GAP-13). Pinning it at the workspace root hoists it where every consumer can find it.
